title: Welcome & Farewell
subtitle: Configure welcome and farewell messages, images, and auto-roles.
loadingSubtitle: Configure welcome and farewell messages for your server.

welcome.title: Welcome Message
welcome.description: Send a custom embed when a new member joins.

welcomeImage.title: Welcome Image
welcomeImage.description: Generate a custom image card with the member's avatar when they join.
welcomeImage.disabled: Enable the toggle above to configure welcome images.

farewell.title: Farewell Message
farewell.description: Send a message when a member leaves the server.

farewellImage.title: Farewell Image
farewellImage.description: Generate a custom farewell card when a member leaves.
farewellImage.disabled: Enable the toggle above to configure farewell images.

dm.title: Welcome DM
dm.description: Send a direct message to new members. Will silently fail if DMs are disabled.

autorole.title: Auto-Role
autorole.description: Automatically assign roles to new members when they join. Bots are excluded. The bot must have a role higher than the roles listed here.
autorole.label: Role IDs (comma-separated)

embed.title: Title
embed.descriptionPlaceholder: Hey {user}, welcome to **{server}**! You are member #{membercount}.

background.title: Background
background.fileHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 3 MB.

accent.title: Accent Color
accent.hint: Used for decorations, borders, and template accents.

toast.imageTooLarge: Background image must be under 3 MB

toast.testSent: Test message will be sent to <#{{channelId}}>
